_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Oversee policy standards and implementation strategy development
reference_document_element_description: Monitor and analyze regulatory developments, enforcement actions, and supervisory authority guidance relevant to organizational data and AI activities, producing impact assessments and recommended responses.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. Task RC-T-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-S-005 (RC, cosine: 0.516), RM-T-008 (RM, cosine: 0.515).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.6/10 (raw 0.365). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. NICE-only terms [development, implementation, oversee, policy, standards, strategy] vs WIDAI-only terms [actions, activities, ai, analyze, assessments, authority] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.857 (P=0.867, R=0.846). P exceeds R by 0.021 — the NICE element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 24 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Oversee policy standards and implementation strategy development" and "Monitor and analyze regulatory developments, enforcement actions, and supervisor" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.537 > STS 0.365 (gap +0.171). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.7%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. NICE terms: [development, implementation, oversee, policy, standards, strategy]. WIDAI terms: [actions, activities, ai, analyze, assessments, authority].
